markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content production, performance, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Strong Performance Signals:** A "building envelope issues" article hit \#2 on Google and appeared in an AI Overview within weeks, demonstrating the content strategy's effectiveness.
  - [**Production Cadence:** 6 articles are awaiting Rimkus review for a Friday publish; the weekly cadence is critical for maintaining momentum and gathering performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Strategic Collaboration:** Rimkus will provide trending industry topics via Slack to create timely, high-authority content.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [**Expert Content Integration:** Exploring using a new expert's book on trucking defense forensics as a primary source to boost authority in the transportation cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Reporting

  - **Early Success:** The "building envelope issues" article hit \#2 on Google and was referenced in an AI Overview within weeks of publishing.
      - [**Significance:** This validates the content strategy, especially the "clustering" approach, by showing quick gains on high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Reporting for Stakeholder Buy-in:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [Rimkus needs tangible wins (e.g., specific search queries) to demonstrate ROI to leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [GrowthX will provide these examples in monthly reports and via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**AI Search Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [GrowthX currently uses Scrunch to track AI prompt performance.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Rimkus has a similar partnership with Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [GrowthX is building a proprietary tool for more granular control, launching in Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [**Future Goal:** Segment performance data by service line (BES vs. Forensics).](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### Content Production & Cadence

  - [**Current Status:** GrowthX is in full production.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [**Published:** 5 articles last week.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**Awaiting Review:** 6 articles for a Friday publish.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**In Production:** 5 articles for next week, including one refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Publishing will pause Dec 29–Jan 2.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [To prevent a review bottleneck, GrowthX will send articles early for the week of Christmas.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Rimkus Homework:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [Add \~110 new forensic assignments to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This expands the content roadmap and may reveal new "low-hanging fruit" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

### Strategic Content Opportunities

  - [**Trending Industry Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Timely content on current events (e.g., legislation) builds authority and can capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Rimkus provides a topic → GrowthX conducts keyword research and integrates it into the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**Expert Book Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** A new expert has a book on trucking defense forensics.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [**Potential Uses:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
        1.  [**Primary Source:** Use the book as a source to boost authority in the transportation cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
        2.  [**CTAs:** Optimize CTAs on relevant articles to direct traffic to the expert's profile.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
        3.  [**Promotion:** Rimkus will likely handle the book's specific promotional content.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rimkus:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Review the 6 articles for a Friday publish.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Add \~110 forensic assignments to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [Provide trending industry topics via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [Confirm with the expert if their book can be used as a content source.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [Investigate optimizing CTAs to direct traffic to specific expert profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [Research best practices for promoting expert-authored books.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
      - [Share tangible performance wins (e.g., SERP rankings, AI Overviews) in Slack and monthly reports.](https://fathom.video/share/yNdgG6zdtN2L_41uX-B4KizxEZ9cswKT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
